growth_records.snippet: The growth rate of L. amylovorus was found to be 14% higher at 30 °C, from 0.052 ± 0.026 to 0.045 ± 0.005 h−1.
growth_records.notes: Growth rate at 30°C, OD-curve fitting (growthcurver), SM medium, 96-well plate assay; 0.052/0.045=1.156 i.e. ~15.6% higher, consistent with stated '14% higher'.
